custody_adjustment.warning_message: Illinois uses a Shared Physical Care worksheet (basic obligation x 1.5, offset by each parent's overnight share) when each parent has at least 146 overnights/year (dropping to 110 on 2027-01-01) — this calculator's standard result does not apply. Use Illinois's official Shared Physical Care worksheet for a shared-parenting calculation.

deviation_note: Courts may deviate from the guideline amount for documented reasons — this calculator shows the presumptive guideline amount only, not a court order. Above $27,375/month combined net income, courts determine support case-by-case.
